items.name_cn:
New Grey Embroidery 🦋🦋/Colorful Constellation
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with the multicolor Rêve d'Infini pattern embroidery designed by artist Pietro Ruffo, it infuses a dreamy element into a classic design, reinterpreting the star symbol beloved by Christian Dior. It can hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring the CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Style: 8001
36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm
Front featuring CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy

items.name_en: ❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
items.name_cn:
❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 21.5 x 12 x 6 cm
Style: 9207

items.name_cn:
🦋🦋New Arrival
The Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a signature piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with multicolor Dior Jardin Botanique embroidery, the romantic floral pattern is inspired by the Grand-Via garden cherished by Monsieur Dior. It accommodates various daily essentials. Large size, featuring a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Size: 41cm
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style No.: 8001

items.name_en: Lady Dior quilted matte calfskin flap bag, including the hardware chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant. Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
items.name_cn:
Lady Dior quilted matte calfskin flap bag, including the hardware chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant. Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 17cm.
Style No.: 6603

specs.rawTitle:
Lady Dior quilted matte calfskin flap bag, including the hardware chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant. Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 17cm.
Style No.: 6603

items.name_cn:
Dio Lady Matte Blue 17cm
Model: 6603
Classic and timeless, the matte finish is a must-have for early spring and early summer.
Pair it with fresh blue jeans this summer and you'll be the trendiest on the street!
Pure blue exudes a French lazy fairy vibe, clean and pure yet creative.
Can be sweet, cool, or ethereal.
Compared to Dior's previous glossy and lambskin versions, the matte calfskin is more durable and less prone to scratches.
Notably, the chain is the same color as the bag body, making it very eye-catching.
Three-compartment mini size with enough daily capacity, it won't dig into your hand.
A highly cost-effective entry-level luxury bag.
Dimensions: 17*7.5*14

items.name_cn:
❤️❤️Lady Dior My 4-Compartment Matte Badge
A profound insight into elegance and beauty. Stylish and soft, timeless yet modern.
Exquisitely crafted from matte calfskin, wrapped in the iconic quilted stitching, showcasing fine craftsmanship.
The strap includes ❤️🌟🍀 3 matching tone badges, an internal zip pocket and slip pocket.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 20 *16.5 * 8
Model: 6604

items.name_cn:
❤️❤️Lady Dior My 20cm
A profound insight into elegance and beauty. Stylish and soft, timeless yet modern.
Exquisitely crafted from matte calfskin, wrapped in the iconic quilted stitching, showcasing fine craftsmanship.
Adorned with matching iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the classic silhouette.
Matching tone symbol badges can be added to the shoulder strap to embellish daily or evening looks, showcasing a distinct personality.
Dimensions: 20 *16.5 * 8
Model: 6604

items.name_cn:
❣️ Montaigne Avenue Bag
This bag features an elegant design that elevates the classic series.
Exquisitely crafted from white patent leather, the rounded flap curves are refined, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather.
Accordion pleat design, spacious, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD buckle
Back Montaigne embossed logo
Adjustable chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather, with leather strap
Three compartments
Dimensions: 22
Model: 9261
